thickness.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the progress component for linear thickness.

radius.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the progress component for linear radius.

size.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the progress component for circular size.

track-width.$description: Material 3 dimension used by the progress component for circular track width.

color.$description: Material 3 color used by the progress component for track color.
Material 3 color used by the progress component for indicator color.
